title: Smooth Transitions
description: Add CSS transitions to a button so it smoothly changes color, size, and shadow on hover

validationRules.message: The button should have a 0.3s transition duration
The transition should use ease timing function
The button default background should be blue

hints.text: Transitions animate property changes over time. They are defined on the base state, not the hover state.
Add 'transition: background-color 0.3s ease, box-shadow 0.3s ease' to .action-btn. Define the :hover state with new values.
.action-btn { transition: all 0.3s ease; } .action-btn:hover { background-color: #0056b3; box-shadow: 0 4px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.2); }
